identity.philosophy: Soft Precision - A blend of Swiss clarity and organic approachability. Clean, airy, professional, but not sterile.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Soft Utility' with 'Swiss Precision'.
Emotion First: The app should feel 'Organized' and 'Calm'.
Content is King: Data is the hero, UI is the stage.
Zoom In: Focus on essential details.
Negative Space: Generous padding to reduce cognitive load.

sidebar.style: border-r border-slate-100 bg-white h-screen sticky top-0

header.style: border-b border-slate-100 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-50

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-slate-900 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 transition-colors rounded-lg px-4 py-2
buttons.destructive: bg-red-50 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 hover:text-red-700 transition-colors rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium

cards.base: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300 p-6

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary/20 focus-visible:border-primary disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 transition-all duration-200
inputs.label: text-sm font-medium leading-none peer-disabled:cursor-not-allowed peer-disabled:opacity-70 text-slate-700 mb-2 block

tables.container: w-full overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-slate-100 bg-white shadow-sm
tables.header_cell: h-12 px-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-slate-500 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Outfit'.
DO NOT use generic teal (#1B93A4). Use Indigo (#4F46E5) or Violet.
DO NOT use full-screen gradients. Use subtle noise or clean whites.
Prefer 'Cardless' designs for dense data (use tables/lists with dividers).
Use 'Bento' grids for dashboards, not equal squares.
Inputs must have a background color (slate-50), not just a border.
Buttons must have a 'pill' or 'rounded-lg' shape, never sharp rectangles.
Add 'micro-interactions' to every hover state (scale, lift, or color shift).
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a React + Tailwind + Shadcn ERP. Use the colors and typography defined here. Override the default Shadcn variables in 'index.css' with the palette provided. Create a 'Layout' component that implements the Sidebar and Header specs. Use the 'Outfit' font for all headings (h1-h4) and 'Inter' for body text. Ensure all forms use the 'inputs' styling defined above.
